Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar May-19-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Not contested, not argued and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion for Leave to File First Amended Complaint is GRANTED under Code of Civil Procedure section 473(a)(1). No opposition filed. The First Amended Complaint is deemed served on all defendants who have previously appeared herein, as of the date of the granting of the Motion to Amend. Plaintiff must file the amended pleading within 10 days of the entry of order on the instant motion. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
